title: Barron's And Bloomberg 2023 Ideal Dividend Stocks Of The Year
text: Two Barron's Annual Roundtable, plus one Bloomberg Intelligence articles published late-January listed 99 intriguing stocks for 2023; 77 were unduplicated US publicly-listed companies, of which, 56 paid-dividends. Barron's two roundtable discussions January 20 and 27 split 49 picks from 9 panelists in half, whereas Bloomberg detailed all 50 in their January 16 BusinessWeek edition.

title: Where Will Raytheon Be In 5 Years?
text: In this article, we assess Raytheon's long-term potential, using its earnings, industry developments, and other forces that drive its ability to grow. After three mixed years, Raytheon is back on track, thanks to rebounding demand in its defense and commercial segments and normalizing supply chains and global air traffic numbers.

title: Raytheon: Set To Soar
text: We share another one of the Mega-Cap stocks that has the setup to reach all-time highs in 2023. What is the fundamental snapshot for RTX at the moment? Lyn Alden shares her take along with commentary.

title: Raytheon: Q4 2022 Earnings Results Surprise On Outlook; Raising Price Target
text: Outlook certainly surprised the consensus estimates, and helps justify a higher valuation in our model, which is why we value RTX at $110. What drove the better than expected results had everything to do with the commercial side of the business and improvement in volume/deliveries tied to other equipment orders.

title: Is It Time To Get Aggressive With Defense Stocks?
text: The Q4 reports from Raytheon (NYSE: RTX) and Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) echoed each other in that results are strong, growth is on the table, earnings and cash flow are ample, and capital returns are on the rise. What this means for investors is that it might be time to start getting defensive with these stocks but which one?

text: The latest step in integrating Raytheon Technologies business lines is aimed at making the enterprise more efficient, innovative and responsive to customers. If it succeeds, the company could become the undisputed leader in aerospace and defense markets.

title: Raytheon Technologies (RTX) Surpasses Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: Raytheon Technologies (RTX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.42% and 0.57%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Raytheon sales fall slightly short of estimates as it announces to realign into three business segments
text: Raytheon Technologies Corp. RTX, +2.00% said Tuesday it had net income of $1.422 billion, or 96 cents a share, in the fourth quarter, more than double the $686 million, or 46 cents a share, posted in the year-earlier period. Adjusted per-share earnings came to $1.27, ahead of the $1.24 FactSet consensus.

title: Raytheon Technologies Reports 2022 Results, Announces 2023 Outlook and Plan to Realign into Three Business Segments

title: Raytheon: Why I Have Mixed Feelings

title: Raytheon Technologies Expands Bengaluru Operations with Opening of Pratt & Whitney India Engineering Center
text: BENGALURU, India , Jan. 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Pratt & Whitney, a Raytheon Technologies (NYSE: RTX) business, today officially opened the doors to its new India Engineering Center* (IEC) in Bengaluru. The facility is co-located with Pratt & Whitney's India Capabilities Center (ICC), which opened in 2022 to provide integrated global supply chain support, and the recently inaugurated Collins Aerospace engineering and global operations centers.

title: Federman & Sherwood Investigates Rackspace Technology for Data Breach
text: OKLAHOMA CITY--( BUSINESS WIRE )--The law firm of Federman & Sherwood has initiated an investigation into Rackspace Technology, Inc [NASDAQ: RTX] with respect to a data breach. On December 6, 2022, Rackspace reported that they recently experienced a cyber incident that involved unauthorized access to their network. In response, Rackspace promptly took steps to secure its environment and investigate the incident.

title: Federman & Sherwood Investigates Rackspace Technology for Data Breach
text: OKLAHOMA CITY--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The law firm of Federman & Sherwood has initiated an investigation into Rackspace Technology, Inc [NASDAQ: RTX] with respect to a data breach. On December 6, 2022, Rackspace reported that they recently experienced a cyber incident that involved unauthorized access to their network. In response, Rackspace promptly took steps to secure its environment and investigate the incident. Rackspace customers files containing customer data that included names and/or personal identifiers, emails, calendars, and contacts were accessed and/or acquired from their network between November 2022 and December 15, 2022. If you wish to discuss this action, obtain further information and participate in this litigation contact Lacrista A. Bagley either by email at lab@federmanlaw.com or visit our firm’s website www.federmanlaw.com.

title: Raytheon Technologies: Hurry Up And Wait For A Generational Boom In Defense Spending
